ayahs.translation: Ṭā, Seen, Meem.
These are the verses of the clear Book.

ayahs.arabic: لَعَلَّكَ بَـٰخِعٌ نَّفْسَكَ أَلَّا يَكُونُوا۟ مُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: Perhaps, [O Muḥammad], you would kill yourself with grief that they will not be believers.

ayahs.arabic: إِن نَّشَأْ نُنَزِّلْ عَلَيْهِم مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ ءَايَةً فَظَلَّتْ أَعْنَـٰقُهُمْ لَهَا خَـٰضِعِينَ
ayahs.translation: If We willed, We could send down to them from the sky a sign for which their necks would remain humbled.
ayahs.transliteration: In nasha/ nunazzil AAalayhim mina assama-iayatan fathallat aAAnaquhum lahakhadiAAeen

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن ذِكْرٍ مِّنَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ مُحْدَثٍ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ عَنْهُ مُعْرِضِينَ
ayahs.translation: And no mention [i.e., revelation] comes to them anew from the Most Merciful except that they turn away from it.
ayahs.transliteration: Wama ya/teehim min thikrin minaarrahmani muhdathin illa kanooAAanhu muAArideen

ayahs.arabic: فَقَدْ كَذَّبُوا۟ فَسَيَأْتِيهِمْ أَنۢبَـٰٓؤُا۟ مَا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
ayahs.translation: For they have already denied, but there will come to them the news of that which they used to ridicule.
ayahs.transliteration: Faqad kaththaboo fasaya/teehim anbaoma kanoo bihi yastahzi-oon

ayahs.arabic: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ إِلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ كَمْ أَنۢبَتْنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوْجٍ كَرِيمٍ
ayahs.translation: Did they not look at the earth - how much We have produced therein from every noble kind?
ayahs.transliteration: Awa lam yaraw ila al-ardi kamanbatna feeha min kulli zawjin kareem

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
ayahs.transliteration: Inna fee thalika laayatan wamakana aktharuhum mu/mineen

ayahs.translation: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبُّكَ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنِ ٱئْتِ ٱلْقَوْمَ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
ayahs.translation: And [mention] when your Lord called Moses, [saying], "Go to the wrongdoing people -
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-ith nada rabbukamoosa ani i/ti alqawma aththalimeen

ayahs.translation: The people of Pharaoh. Will they not fear Allāh?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ أَن يُكَذِّبُونِ
ayahs.translation: He said, "My Lord, indeed I fear that they will deny me

ayahs.arabic: وَيَضِيقُ صَدْرِى وَلَا يَنطَلِقُ لِسَانِى فَأَرْسِلْ إِلَىٰ هَـٰرُونَ
ayahs.translation: And that my breast will tighten and my tongue will not be fluent, so send for Aaron.
ayahs.transliteration: Wayadeequ sadree walayantaliqu lisanee faarsil ila haroon

ayahs.arabic: وَلَهُمْ عَلَىَّ ذَنۢبٌ فَأَخَافُ أَن يَقْتُلُونِ
ayahs.translation: And they have upon me a [claim due to] sin, so I fear that they will kill me."

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ كَلَّا ۖ فَٱذْهَبَا بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَآ ۖ إِنَّا مَعَكُم مُّسْتَمِعُونَ
ayahs.translation: [Allāh] said, "No. Go both of you with Our signs; indeed, We are with you, listening.
ayahs.transliteration: Qala kalla fathhababi-ayatina inna maAAakum mustamiAAoon

ayahs.arabic: فَأْتِيَا فِرْعَوْنَ فَقُولَآ إِنَّا رَسُولُ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.translation: Go to Pharaoh and say, 'We are the messengers of the Lord of the worlds,
ayahs.transliteration: Fa/tiya firAAawna faqoola innarasoolu rabbi alAAalameen

ayahs.translation: [Commanded to say], "Send with us the Children of Israel."'"

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ أَلَمْ نُرَبِّكَ فِينَا وَلِيدًا وَلَبِثْتَ فِينَا مِنْ عُمُرِكَ سِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: [Pharaoh] said, "Did we not raise you among us as a child, and you remained among us for years of your life?
ayahs.transliteration: Qala alam nurabbika feenawaleedan walabithta feena min AAumurika sineen

ayahs.arabic: وَفَعَلْتَ فَعْلَتَكَ ٱلَّتِى فَعَلْتَ وَأَنتَ مِنَ ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ
ayahs.translation: And [then] you did your deed which you did, and you were of the ungrateful."
ayahs.transliteration: WafaAAalta faAAlataka allatee faAAaltawaanta mina alkafireen

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ فَعَلْتُهَآ إِذًا وَأَنَا۠ مِنَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
ayahs.translation: [Moses] said, "I did it, then, while I was of those astray [i.e., ignorant].

ayahs.arabic: فَفَرَرْتُ مِنكُمْ لَمَّا خِفْتُكُمْ فَوَهَبَ لِى رَبِّى حُكْمًا وَجَعَلَنِى مِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
ayahs.translation: So I fled from you when I feared you. Then my Lord granted me judgement [i.e., wisdom and prophet hood] and appointed me [as one] of the messengers.
ayahs.transliteration: Fafarartu minkum lamma khiftukumfawahaba lee rabbee hukman wajaAAalanee mina almursaleen

ayahs.arabic: وَتِلْكَ نِعْمَةٌ تَمُنُّهَا عَلَىَّ أَنْ عَبَّدتَّ بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ
ayahs.translation: And is this a favor of which you remind me - that you have enslaved the Children of Israel?"
ayahs.transliteration: Watilka niAAmatun tamunnuha AAalayyaan AAabbadta banee isra-eel

ayahs.translation: Said Pharaoh, "And what is the Lord of the worlds?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ رَبُّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ ۖ إِن كُنتُم مُّوقِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: [Moses] said, "The Lord of the heavens and earth and that between them, if you should be convinced."
ayahs.transliteration: Qala rabbu assamawatiwal-ardi wama baynahuma in kuntummooqineen

ayahs.translation: [Pharaoh] said to those around him, "Do you not hear?"
[Moses] said, "Your Lord and the Lord of your first forefathers."

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ إِنَّ رَسُولَكُمُ ٱلَّذِىٓ أُرْسِلَ إِلَيْكُمْ لَمَجْنُونٌ
ayahs.translation: [Pharaoh] said, "Indeed, your 'messenger' who has been sent to you is mad."
ayahs.transliteration: Qala inna rasoolakumu allatheeorsila ilaykum lamajnoon

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ رَبُّ ٱلْمَشْرِقِ وَٱلْمَغْرِبِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ ۖ إِن كُنتُمْ تَعْقِلُونَ
ayahs.translation: [Moses] said, "Lord of the east and the west and that between them, if you were to reason."
ayahs.transliteration: Qala rabbu almashriqi walmaghribiwama baynahuma in kuntum taAAqiloon

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ لَئِنِ ٱتَّخَذْتَ إِلَـٰهًا غَيْرِى لَأَجْعَلَنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلْمَسْجُونِينَ
ayahs.translation: [Pharaoh] said, "If you take a god other than me, I will surely place you among those imprisoned."
ayahs.transliteration: Qala la-ini ittakhathta ilahanghayree laajAAalannaka mina almasjooneen

ayahs.translation: [Moses] said, "Even if I brought you something [i.e., proof] manifest?"
ayahs.transliteration: Qala awa law ji/tuka bishay-in mubeen

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ فَأْتِ بِهِۦٓ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰدِقِينَ
ayahs.translation: [Pharaoh] said, "Then bring it, if you should be of the truthful."
ayahs.transliteration: Qala fa/ti bihi in kunta mina assadiqeen

ayahs.arabic: فَأَلْقَىٰ عَصَاهُ فَإِذَا هِىَ ثُعْبَانٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahs.translation: So [Moses] threw his staff, and suddenly it was a serpent manifest.

ayahs.arabic: وَنَزَعَ يَدَهُۥ فَإِذَا هِىَ بَيْضَآءُ لِلنَّـٰظِرِينَ
ayahs.translation: And he drew out his hand; thereupon it was white for the observers.

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ لِلْمَلَإِ حَوْلَهُۥٓ إِنَّ هَـٰذَا لَسَـٰحِرٌ عَلِيمٌ
ayahs.translation: [Pharaoh] said to the eminent ones around him, "Indeed, this is a learned magician.
ayahs.transliteration: Qala lilmala-i hawlahu inna hathalasahirun AAaleem

ayahs.arabic: يُرِيدُ أَن يُخْرِجَكُم مِّنْ أَرْضِكُم بِسِحْرِهِۦ فَمَاذَا تَأْمُرُونَ
ayahs.translation: He wants to drive you out of your land by his magic, so what do you advise?"
ayahs.transliteration: Yureedu an yukhrijakum min ardikumbisihrihi famatha ta/muroon

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ أَرْجِهْ وَأَخَاهُ وَٱبْعَثْ فِى ٱلْمَدَآئِنِ حَـٰشِرِينَ
ayahs.translation: They said, "Postpone [the matter of] him and his brother and send among the cities gatherers
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo arjih waakhahu wabAAathfee almada-ini hashireen

ayahs.translation: Who will bring you every learned, skilled magician."
So the magicians were assembled for the appointment of a well-known day.
And it was said to the people, "Will you congregate.

ayahs.arabic: لَعَلَّنَا نَتَّبِعُ ٱلسَّحَرَةَ إِن كَانُوا۟ هُمُ ٱلْغَـٰلِبِينَ
ayahs.translation: That we might follow the magicians if they are the predominant?"
ayahs.transliteration: LaAAallana nattabiAAu assaharatain kanoo humu alghalibeen

ayahs.arabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَ ٱلسَّحَرَةُ قَالُوا۟ لِفِرْعَوْنَ أَئِنَّ لَنَا لَأَجْرًا إِن كُنَّا نَحْنُ ٱلْغَـٰلِبِينَ
ayahs.translation: And when the magicians arrived, they said to Pharaoh, "Is there indeed for us a reward if we are the predominant?"
ayahs.transliteration: Falamma jaa assaharatuqaloo lifirAAawna a-inna lana laajran in kunnanahnu alghalibeen

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ نَعَمْ وَإِنَّكُمْ إِذًا لَّمِنَ ٱلْمُقَرَّبِينَ
ayahs.translation: He said, "Yes, and indeed, you will then be of those near [to me]."

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ لَهُم مُّوسَىٰٓ أَلْقُوا۟ مَآ أَنتُم مُّلْقُونَ
ayahs.translation: Moses said to them, "Throw whatever you will throw."
ayahs.transliteration: Qala lahum moosa alqoo maantum mulqoon

ayahs.arabic: فَأَلْقَوْا۟ حِبَالَهُمْ وَعِصِيَّهُمْ وَقَالُوا۟ بِعِزَّةِ فِرْعَوْنَ إِنَّا لَنَحْنُ ٱلْغَـٰلِبُونَ
ayahs.translation: So they threw their ropes and their staffs and said, "By the might of Pharaoh, indeed it is we who are predominant."
ayahs.transliteration: Faalqaw hibalahum waAAisiyyahumwaqaloo biAAizzati firAAawna inna lanahnualghaliboon

ayahs.arabic: فَأَلْقَىٰ مُوسَىٰ عَصَاهُ فَإِذَا هِىَ تَلْقَفُ مَا يَأْفِكُونَ
ayahs.translation: Then Moses threw his staff, and at once it devoured what they falsified.
ayahs.transliteration: Faalqa moosa AAasahufa-itha hiya talqafu ma ya/fikoon

ayahs.translation: So the magicians fell down in prostration [to Allāh].
They said, "We have believed in the Lord of the worlds,
The Lord of Moses and Aaron."

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ ءَامَنتُمْ لَهُۥ قَبْلَ أَنْ ءَاذَنَ لَكُمْ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ لَكَبِيرُكُمُ ٱلَّذِى عَلَّمَكُمُ ٱلسِّحْرَ فَلَسَوْفَ تَعْلَمُونَ ۚ لَأُقَطِّعَنَّ أَيْدِيَكُمْ وَأَرْجُلَكُم مِّنْ خِلَـٰفٍ وَلَأُصَلِّبَنَّكُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahs.translation: [Pharaoh] said, "You believed him [i.e., Moses] before I gave you permission. Indeed, he is your leader who has taught you magic, but you are going to know. I will surely cut off your hands and your feet on opposite sides, and I will surely crucify you all."
ayahs.transliteration: Qala amantum lahu qabla an athanalakum innahu lakabeerukumu allathee AAallamakumu assihrafalasawfa taAAlamoona laoqattiAAanna aydiyakum waarjulakummin khilafin walaosallibannakum ajmaAAeen

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ لَا ضَيْرَ ۖ إِنَّآ إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا مُنقَلِبُونَ
ayahs.translation: They said, "No harm. Indeed, to our Lord we will return.
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo la dayra innaila rabbina munqaliboon

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّا نَطْمَعُ أَن يَغْفِرَ لَنَا رَبُّنَا خَطَـٰيَـٰنَآ أَن كُنَّآ أَوَّلَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, we aspire that our Lord will forgive us our sins because we were the first of the believers."
ayahs.transliteration: Inna natmaAAu an yaghfira lanarabbuna khatayana an kunnaawwala almu/mineen

ayahs.arabic: ۞ وَأَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنْ أَسْرِ بِعِبَادِىٓ إِنَّكُم مُّتَّبَعُونَ
ayahs.translation: And We inspired to Moses, "Travel by night with My servants; indeed, you will be pursued."
ayahs.transliteration: Waawhayna ila moosaan asri biAAibadee innakum muttabaAAoon

ayahs.translation: Then Pharaoh sent among the cities gatherers
[And said], "Indeed, those are but a small band,
And indeed, they are enraging us,
And indeed, we are a cautious society..."
So We removed them from gardens and springs
And treasures and honorable station -
Thus. And We caused to inherit it the Children of Israel.
So they pursued them at sunrise.

ayahs.arabic: فَلَمَّا تَرَٰٓءَا ٱلْجَمْعَانِ قَالَ أَصْحَـٰبُ مُوسَىٰٓ إِنَّا لَمُدْرَكُونَ
ayahs.translation: And when the two companies saw one another, the companions of Moses said, "Indeed, we are to be overtaken!"
ayahs.transliteration: Falamma taraa aljamAAaniqala as-habu moosa innalamudrakoon

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ كَلَّآ ۖ إِنَّ مَعِىَ رَبِّى سَيَهْدِينِ
ayahs.translation: [Moses] said, "No! Indeed, with me is my Lord; He will guide me."

ayahs.arabic: فَأَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنِ ٱضْرِب بِّعَصَاكَ ٱلْبَحْرَ ۖ فَٱنفَلَقَ فَكَانَ كُلُّ فِرْقٍ كَٱلطَّوْدِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
ayahs.translation: Then We inspired to Moses, "Strike with your staff the sea," and it parted, and each portion was like a great towering mountain.
ayahs.transliteration: Faawhayna ila moosaani idrib biAAasaka albahra fanfalaqafakana kullu firqin kattawdi alAAatheem

ayahs.translation: And We advanced thereto the others [i.e., the pursuers].
And We saved Moses and those with him, all together.
Then We drowned the others.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
ayahs.transliteration: Inna fee thalika laayatan wamakana aktharuhum mu/mineen

ayahs.translation: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
And recite to them the news of Abraham,

ayahs.arabic: إِذْ قَالَ لِأَبِيهِ وَقَوْمِهِۦ مَا تَعْبُدُونَ
ayahs.translation: When he said to his father and his people, "What do you worship?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ نَعْبُدُ أَصْنَامًا فَنَظَلُّ لَهَا عَـٰكِفِينَ
ayahs.translation: They said, "We worship idols and remain to them devoted."
He said, "Do they hear you when you supplicate?
Or do they benefit you, or do they harm?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ بَلْ وَجَدْنَآ ءَابَآءَنَا كَذَٰلِكَ يَفْعَلُونَ
ayahs.translation: They said, "But we found our fathers doing thus."
He said, "Then do you see what you have been worshipping,
You and your ancient forefathers?

ayahs.arabic: فَإِنَّهُمْ عَدُوٌّ لِّىٓ إِلَّا رَبَّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, they are enemies to me, except the Lord of the worlds,
Who created me, and He [it is who] guides me.
And it is He who feeds me and gives me drink.
And when I am ill, it is He who cures me
And who will cause me to die and then bring me to life

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلَّذِىٓ أَطْمَعُ أَن يَغْفِرَ لِى خَطِيٓـَٔتِى يَوْمَ ٱلدِّينِ
ayahs.translation: And who I aspire that He will forgive me my sin on the Day of Recompense."
ayahs.transliteration: Wallathee atmaAAu anyaghfira lee khatee-atee yawma addeen

ayahs.arabic: رَبِّ هَبْ لِى حُكْمًا وَأَلْحِقْنِى بِٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ
ayahs.translation: [And he said], "My Lord, grant me authority and join me with the righteous.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱجْعَل لِّى لِسَانَ صِدْقٍ فِى ٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ
ayahs.translation: And grant me a mention [i.e., reputation] of honor among later generations.
And place me among the inheritors of the Garden of Pleasure.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِأَبِىٓ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
ayahs.translation: And forgive my father. Indeed, he has been of those astray.
And do not disgrace me on the Day they are [all] resurrected -

ayahs.arabic: يَوْمَ لَا يَنفَعُ مَالٌ وَلَا بَنُونَ
ayahs.translation: The Day when there will not benefit [anyone] wealth or children

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا مَنْ أَتَى ٱللَّهَ بِقَلْبٍ سَلِيمٍ
ayahs.translation: But only one who comes to Allāh with a sound heart."
And Paradise will be brought near [that Day] to the righteous.
And Hellfire will be brought forth for the deviators,

ayahs.arabic: وَقِيلَ لَهُمْ أَيْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْبُدُونَ
ayahs.translation: And it will be said to them, "Where are those you used to worship

ayahs.arabic: مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ هَلْ يَنصُرُونَكُمْ أَوْ يَنتَصِرُونَ
ayahs.translation: Other than Allāh? Can they help you or help themselves?"
ayahs.transliteration: Min dooni Allahi hal yansuroonakumaw yantasiroon

ayahs.translation: So they will be overturned into it [i.e., Hellfire], they and the deviators
And the soldiers of Iblees, all together.
They will say while they dispute therein,

ayahs.arabic: تَٱللَّهِ إِن كُنَّا لَفِى ضَلَـٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahs.translation: "By Allāh, we were indeed in manifest error
When we equated you with the Lord of the worlds.
And no one misguided us except the criminals.
So now we have no intercessors
And not a devoted friend.

ayahs.arabic: فَلَوْ أَنَّ لَنَا كَرَّةً فَنَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: Then if we only had a return [to the world] and could be of the believers..."
ayahs.transliteration: Falaw anna lana karratan fanakoonamina almu/mineen

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
ayahs.transliteration: Inna fee thalika laayatan wamakana aktharuhum mu/mineen

ayahs.translation: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
The people of Noah denied the messengers

ayahs.arabic: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ نُوحٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ayahs.translation: When their brother Noah said to them, "Will you not fear Allāh?
ayahs.transliteration: Ith qala lahum akhoohum noohunala tattaqoon

ayahs.translation: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger.
So fear Allāh and obey me.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.translation: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds.
ayahs.transliteration: Wama as-alukum AAalayhi min ajrin inajriya illa AAala rabbi alAAalameen

ayahs.translation: So fear Allāh and obey me."
They said, "Should we believe you while you are followed by the lowest [class of people]?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ وَمَا عِلْمِى بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ
ayahs.translation: He said, "And what is my knowledge of what they used to do?

ayahs.arabic: إِنْ حِسَابُهُمْ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّى ۖ لَوْ تَشْعُرُونَ
ayahs.translation: Their account is only upon my Lord, if you [could] perceive.
ayahs.transliteration: In hisabuhum illa AAalarabbee law tashAAuroon

ayahs.translation: And I am not one to drive away the believers.
I am only a clear warner."

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ لَئِن لَّمْ تَنتَهِ يَـٰنُوحُ لَتَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلْمَرْجُومِينَ
ayahs.translation: They said, "If you do not desist, O Noah, you will surely be of those who are stoned."
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo la-in lam tantahi yanoohu latakoonanna mina almarjoomeen

ayahs.translation: He said, "My Lord, indeed my people have denied me.

ayahs.arabic: فَٱفْتَحْ بَيْنِى وَبَيْنَهُمْ فَتْحًا وَنَجِّنِى وَمَن مَّعِىَ مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: Then judge between me and them with decisive judgement and save me and those with me of the believers."
ayahs.transliteration: Faftah baynee wabaynahum fathanwanajjinee waman maAAiya mina almu/mineen

ayahs.arabic: فَأَنجَيْنَـٰهُ وَمَن مَّعَهُۥ فِى ٱلْفُلْكِ ٱلْمَشْحُونِ
ayahs.translation: So We saved him and those with him in the laden ship.
Then We drowned thereafter the remaining ones.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
ayahs.transliteration: Inna fee thalika laayatan wamakana aktharuhum mu/mineen

ayahs.translation: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
ʿAad denied the messengers

ayahs.arabic: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ هُودٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ayahs.translation: When their brother Hūd said to them, "Will you not fear Allāh?
ayahs.transliteration: Ith qala lahum akhoohumhoodun ala tattaqoon

ayahs.translation: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger.
So fear Allāh and obey me.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.translation: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds.
ayahs.transliteration: Wama as-alukum AAalayhi min ajrin inajriya illa AAala rabbi alAAalameen

ayahs.translation: Do you construct on every elevation a sign, amusing yourselves,
And take for yourselves constructions [i.e., palaces and fortresses] that you might abide eternally?
And when you strike, you strike as tyrants.
So fear Allāh and obey me.
And fear He who provided you with that which you know,
Provided you with grazing livestock and children
And gardens and springs.

ayahs.arabic: إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ عَلَيْكُمْ عَذَابَ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, I fear for you the punishment of a terrible day."

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْنَآ أَوَعَظْتَ أَمْ لَمْ تَكُن مِّنَ ٱلْوَٰعِظِينَ
ayahs.translation: They said, "It is all the same to us whether you advise or are not of the advisors.
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo sawaon AAalaynaawaAAathta am lam takun mina alwaAAitheen

ayahs.translation: This is not but the custom of the former peoples,
And we are not to be punished."

ayahs.arabic: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَهْلَكْنَـٰهُمْ ۗ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: And they denied him, so We destroyed them. Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
ayahs.transliteration: Fakaththaboohu faahlaknahuminna fee thalika laayatan wama kanaaktharuhum mu/mineen

ayahs.translation: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
Thamūd denied the messengers

ayahs.arabic: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ صَـٰلِحٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ayahs.translation: When their brother Ṣāliḥ said to them, "Will you not fear Allāh?
ayahs.transliteration: Ith qala lahum akhoohum salihunala tattaqoon

ayahs.translation: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger.
So fear Allāh and obey me.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.translation: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds.
ayahs.transliteration: Wama as-alukum AAalayhi min ajrin inajriya illa AAala rabbi alAAalameen

ayahs.translation: Will you be left in what is here, secure [from death],
Within gardens and springs
And fields of crops and palm trees with softened fruit?
And you carve out of the mountains, homes, with skill.
So fear Allāh and obey me.
And do not obey the order of the transgressors,

ayahs.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يُفْسِدُونَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَا يُصْلِحُونَ
ayahs.translation: Who cause corruption in the land and do not amend."
They said, "You are only of those affected by magic.

ayahs.arabic: مَآ أَنتَ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُنَا فَأْتِ بِـَٔايَةٍ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰدِقِينَ
ayahs.translation: You are but a man like ourselves, so bring a sign, if you should be of the truthful."
ayahs.transliteration: Ma anta illa basharun mithlunafa/ti bi-ayatin in kunta mina assadiqeena

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ هَـٰذِهِۦ نَاقَةٌ لَّهَا شِرْبٌ وَلَكُمْ شِرْبُ يَوْمٍ مَّعْلُومٍ
ayahs.translation: He said, "This is a she-camel. For her is a [time of] drink, and for you is a [time of] drink, [each] on a known day.
ayahs.transliteration: Qala hathihi naqatunlaha shirbun walakum shirbu yawmin maAAloom

ayahs.arabic: وَلَا تَمَسُّوهَا بِسُوٓءٍ فَيَأْخُذَكُمْ عَذَابُ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ
ayahs.translation: And do not touch her with harm, lest you be seized by the punishment of a terrible day."
ayahs.transliteration: Wala tamassooha bisoo-infaya/khuthakum AAathabu yawmin AAatheem

ayahs.translation: But they hamstrung her and so became regretful.

ayahs.arabic: فَأَخَذَهُمُ ٱلْعَذَابُ ۗ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: And the punishment seized them. Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
ayahs.transliteration: Faakhathahumu alAAathabu innafee thalika laayatan wama kanaaktharuhum mu/mineen

ayahs.translation: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
The people of Lot denied the messengers

ayahs.arabic: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ لُوطٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ayahs.translation: When their brother Lot said to them, "Will you not fear Allāh?
ayahs.transliteration: Ith qala lahum akhoohum lootunala tattaqoon

ayahs.translation: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger.
So fear Allāh and obey me.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.translation: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds.
ayahs.transliteration: Wama as-alukum AAalayhi min ajrin inajriya illa AAala rabbi alAAalameen

ayahs.translation: Do you approach males among the worlds

ayahs.arabic: وَتَذَرُونَ مَا خَلَقَ لَكُمْ رَبُّكُم مِّنْ أَزْوَٰجِكُم ۚ بَلْ أَنتُمْ قَوْمٌ عَادُونَ
ayahs.translation: And leave what your Lord has created for you as mates? But you are a people transgressing."
ayahs.transliteration: Watatharoona ma khalaqa lakumrabbukum min azwajikum bal antum qawmun AAadoon

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ لَئِن لَّمْ تَنتَهِ يَـٰلُوطُ لَتَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلْمُخْرَجِينَ
ayahs.translation: They said, "If you do not desist, O Lot, you will surely be of those evicted."
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo la-in lam tantahi yalootu latakoonanna mina almukhrajeen

ayahs.translation: He said, "Indeed, I am, toward your deed, of those who detest [it].
My Lord, save me and my family from [the consequence of] what they do."
So We saved him and his family, all,
Except an old woman among those who remained behind.
Then We destroyed the others.

ayahs.arabic: وَأَمْطَرْنَا عَلَيْهِم مَّطَرًا ۖ فَسَآءَ مَطَرُ ٱلْمُنذَرِينَ
ayahs.translation: And We rained upon them a rain [of stones], and evil was the rain of those who were warned.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
ayahs.transliteration: Inna fee thalika laayatan wamakana aktharuhum mu/mineen

ayahs.translation: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
The companions of the thicket [i.e., the people of Madyan] denied the messengers

ayahs.arabic: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ شُعَيْبٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ayahs.translation: When Shuʿayb said to them, "Will you not fear Allāh?
Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger.
So fear Allāh and obey me.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.translation: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds.
ayahs.transliteration: Wama as-alukum AAalayhi min ajrin inajriya illa AAala rabbi alAAalameen

ayahs.arabic: ۞ أَوْفُوا۟ ٱلْكَيْلَ وَلَا تَكُونُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلْمُخْسِرِينَ
ayahs.translation: Give full measure and do not be of those who cause loss.
And weigh with an even [i.e., honest] balance.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَا تَبْخَسُوا۟ ٱلنَّاسَ أَشْيَآءَهُمْ وَلَا تَعْثَوْا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ مُفْسِدِينَ
ayahs.translation: And do not deprive people of their due and do not commit abuse on earth, spreading corruption.
ayahs.transliteration: Wala tabkhasoo annasaashyaahum wala taAAthaw fee al-ardimufsideen

ayahs.translation: And fear He who created you and the former creation."
They said, "You are only of those affected by magic.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَآ أَنتَ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُنَا وَإِن نَّظُنُّكَ لَمِنَ ٱلْكَـٰذِبِينَ
ayahs.translation: You are but a man like ourselves, and indeed, we think you are among the liars.
ayahs.transliteration: Wama anta illa basharunmithluna wa-in nathunnuka lamina alkathibeen

ayahs.arabic: فَأَسْقِطْ عَلَيْنَا كِسَفًا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰدِقِينَ
ayahs.translation: So cause to fall upon us fragments of the sky, if you should be of the truthful."
ayahs.transliteration: Faasqit AAalayna kisafan minaassama-i in kunta mina assadiqeen

ayahs.translation: He said, "My Lord is most knowing of what you do."

ayahs.arabic: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَخَذَهُمْ عَذَابُ يَوْمِ ٱلظُّلَّةِ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ عَذَابَ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ
ayahs.translation: And they denied him, so the punishment of the day of the black cloud seized them. Indeed, it was the punishment of a terrible day.
ayahs.transliteration: Fakaththaboohu faakhathahumAAathabu yawmi aththullati innahu kanaAAathaba yawmin AAatheem

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
ayahs.transliteration: Inna fee thalika laayatan wamakana aktharuhum mu/mineen

ayahs.translation: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
And indeed, it [i.e., the Qur’ān] is the revelation of the Lord of the worlds.
The Trustworthy Spirit [i.e., Gabriel] has brought it down
Upon your heart, [O Muḥammad] - that you may be of the warners -
In a clear Arabic language.
And indeed, it is [mentioned] in the scriptures of former peoples.

ayahs.arabic: أَوَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُمْ ءَايَةً أَن يَعْلَمَهُۥ عُلَمَـٰٓؤُا۟ بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ
ayahs.translation: And has it not been a sign to them that it is recognized by the scholars of the Children of Israel?
ayahs.transliteration: Awa lam yakun lahum ayatan anyaAAlamahu AAulamao banee isra-eel

ayahs.translation: And even if We had revealed it to one among the foreigners

ayahs.arabic: فَقَرَأَهُۥ عَلَيْهِم مَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ مُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: And he had recited it to them [perfectly], they would [still] not have been believers in it.
Thus have We inserted it [i.e., disbelief] into the hearts of the criminals.

ayahs.arabic: لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِهِۦ حَتَّىٰ يَرَوُا۟ ٱلْعَذَابَ ٱلْأَلِيمَ
ayahs.translation: They will not believe in it until they see the painful punishment.
ayahs.transliteration: La yu/minoona bihi hattayarawoo alAAathaba al-aleem

ayahs.translation: And it will come to them suddenly while they perceive [it] not.
And they will say, "May we be reprieved?"
So for Our punishment are they impatient?
Then have you considered if We gave them enjoyment for years
And then there came to them that which they were promised?

ayahs.arabic: مَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يُمَتَّعُونَ
ayahs.translation: They would not be availed by the enjoyment with which they were provided.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَآ أَهْلَكْنَا مِن قَرْيَةٍ إِلَّا لَهَا مُنذِرُونَ
ayahs.translation: And We did not destroy any city except that it had warners
ayahs.transliteration: Wama ahlakna min qaryatin illalaha munthiroon

ayahs.translation: As a reminder; and never have We been unjust.
And the devils have not brought it [i.e., the revelation] down.
It is not allowable for them, nor would they be able.
Indeed they, from [its] hearing, are removed.

ayahs.arabic: فَلَا تَدْعُ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَـٰهًا ءَاخَرَ فَتَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُعَذَّبِينَ
ayahs.translation: So do not invoke with Allāh another deity and [thus] be among the punished.
ayahs.transliteration: Fala tadAAu maAAa Allahi ilahanakhara fatakoona mina almuAAaththabeen

ayahs.translation: And warn, [O Muḥammad], your closest kindred.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱخْفِضْ جَنَاحَكَ لِمَنِ ٱتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: And lower your wing [i.e., show kindness] to those who follow you of the believers.

ayahs.arabic: فَإِنْ عَصَوْكَ فَقُلْ إِنِّى بَرِىٓءٌ مِّمَّا تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahs.translation: And if they disobey you, then say, "Indeed, I am disassociated from what you are doing."
ayahs.transliteration: Fa-in AAasawka faqul innee baree-onmimma taAAmaloon

ayahs.translation: And rely upon the Exalted in Might, the Merciful,
Who sees you when you arise
And your movement among those who prostrate.
Indeed, He is the Hearing, the Knowing.

ayahs.arabic: هَلْ أُنَبِّئُكُمْ عَلَىٰ مَن تَنَزَّلُ ٱلشَّيَـٰطِينُ
ayahs.translation: Shall I inform you upon whom the devils descend?
They descend upon every sinful liar.
They pass on what is heard, and most of them are liars.
And the poets - [only] the deviators follow them;

ayahs.arabic: أَلَمْ تَرَ أَنَّهُمْ فِى كُلِّ وَادٍ يَهِيمُونَ
ayahs.translation: Do you not see that in every valley they roam
ayahs.transliteration: Alam tara annahum fee kulli wadinyaheemoon

ayahs.translation: And that they say what they do not do? -

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ وَذَكَرُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ كَثِيرًا وَٱنتَصَرُوا۟ مِنۢ بَعْدِ مَا ظُلِمُوا۟ ۗ وَسَيَعْلَمُ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوٓا۟ أَىَّ مُنقَلَبٍ يَنقَلِبُونَ
ayahs.translation: Except those [poets] who believe and do righteous deeds and remember Allāh often and defend [the Muslims] after they were wronged. And those who have wronged are going to know to what [kind of] return they will be returned.
ayahs.transliteration: Illa allatheena amanoowaAAamiloo assalihati wathakaroo Allahakatheeran wantasaroo min baAAdi ma thulimoowasayaAAlamu allatheena thalamoo ayyamunqalabin yanqaliboon
